finding: A global `--runtime-mode real-agent` is ignored for the Coordinator because `buildTeamRuntimeContract` always resolves the merged selection config first; the implicit repo default has `runtimeMode: broker-only`, so a CLI-requested paid run silently becomes broker-only.
expectedBehavior: Explicit global CLI runtime/provider/model options should override implicit defaults. Role-specific CLI overrides may then override the global selection for their own roles.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed in TASK-AAO-0198: `explicitRuntimeMode` / related flags override repo-default broker-only; regression `team-runtime-precedence.spec.ts`.
followUp: Keep role-specific `--role-provider` above global CLI selection.
